name: C_DocType Material Shipments/Receipts
code:
C_DocType.DocBaseType IN ('MMR', 'MMS') AND C_DocType.IsSOTrx='@IsSOTrx@' AND AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_Org_ID@,C_DocType.AD_Org_ID, @#AD_Client_ID@) <> '-1'
AND (COALESCE(@isReturnMaterial@, 'N') = C_DocType.IsReturn OR COALESCE(@isDocumentTypeWindow@, 'N') = 'Y')

name: C_Project based on status and bpartner
code: C_Project.projectstatus in ('OP', 'OR') and (C_Project.c_bpartner_id=@C_BPartner_ID@ or '@IsSOTrx@'='N') or C_Project.c_project_id = @c_project_id@

name: AD_Org show child organizations
code: AD_ISORGINCLUDED(ad_org.ad_org_id, CASE WHEN (@Parent_AD_Org@ IS NULL OR @Parent_AD_Org@ = '') THEN @AD_ORG_ID@ ELSE @Parent_AD_Org@ END, ad_org.ad_client_id)<>-1 AND IsReady='Y'

name: UOM Validation
code: td0.c_uom_id IN(select p.c_uom_id from m_product p where p.m_product_id = @M_Product_ID@) or td0.c_uom_id IN(select a.c_uom_id from m_product_aum a where a.m_product_id = @M_Product_ID@ and ((@IsSOTrx@ = 'Y' and a.sales <> 'NA') OR (@IsSOTrx@ <> 'Y' and a.purchase <> 'NA')))
